User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Analizador de Costos de Corte application.

CuttingToolAnalysis.title: CuttingToolAnalysis
CuttingToolAnalysis.description: Represents a cutting tool analysis case.

id.description: Unique identifier for the cutting tool analysis case.

userId.description: Reference to the User who created this analysis.

material.description: The type of material being worked on.

dateCreated.description: Date the analysis case was created.

dateModified.description: Date the analysis case was last modified.

modifiedBy.description: Reference to the User who last modified this analysis.

history.description: A log of changes made to the analysis case.

currentToolCost.description: Cost of the current cutting tool.

proposedToolCost.description: Cost of the proposed cutting tool.

definition.description: Stores user profiles, including roles for access control.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Global collection for all cutting tool analysis cases. All authenticated users can read, but only the original creator or an admin can modify or delete.

params.name: cuttingToolAnalysisId
params.description: The unique identifier of the cutting tool analysis case.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure has been updated to support a global repository of cutting tool analysis cases, making them visible to all authenticated users. This promotes knowledge sharing within the organization. The user-specific subcollection has been migrated to a root-level collection `/cuttingToolAnalyses`. The security rules will be updated to allow read access for all authenticated users while restricting write/delete operations to the document owner or an administrator, ensuring data integrity.
